args.body:
Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

Cuisine Types: 
New Israeli Restaurant: Israeli
Breizh Café: French
New Asiaway: Chinese
Le Baratin: French
Bistrot Paul Bert: French
Royal Panda: Chinese
The yard: Chinese
China Garden: Chinese
Miznon: Israeli
Chez L'Ami Jean: French

Ratings: 
New Israeli Restaurant: Rating: 4.5 | Reviews: Authentic Israeli cuisine with a modern twist, Delicious falafel and hummus, Cozy and welcoming atmosphere, Friendly and attentive staff, The food was delicious and the service was excellent
Breizh Café: Rating: 3.9 | Reviews: Best crepes in Paris, both sweet and savory, Authentic Breton cider and artisanal ingredients, Busy spot, expect a wait during peak hours, Gluten-free buckwheat crepes available
New Asiaway: Rating: 4.6 | Reviews: Authentic Chinese cuisine with a modern twist, Fresh ingredients and flavorful sauces, Attentive and knowledgeable staff, Great ambiance and stylish decor
Le Baratin: Rating: 4.8 | Reviews: Small, cozy bistro with delicious, homestyle cooking, Daily changing menu based on fresh market ingredients, Natural wine selection, Cash only
Bistrot Paul Bert: Rating: 4.5 | Reviews: One of the best classic French bistros in Paris, Excellent steak tartare and pommes frites, Charming old-school Parisian atmosphere, Reservations recommended
Royal Panda: Rating: 4.2 | Reviews: Authentic Chinese cuisine with a wide variety of dishes, Friendly and attentive staff, Cozy and inviting atmosphere, Vegetarian and vegan options available
The yard: Rating: 4.3 | Reviews: Delicious Chinese dishes with a modern twist, Fresh ingredients and flavorful sauces, Attentive and knowledgeable staff, Great ambiance and stylish decor
China Garden: Rating: 4.4 | Reviews: Wide selection of authentic Chinese dishes, Fresh ingredients and bold flavors, Friendly and efficient service, Comfortable and spacious dining area
Miznon: Rating: 4.3 | Reviews: Casual Israeli street food, known for their pita sandwiches, Creative, flavorful vegetable dishes, Vibrant, energetic atmosphere, Long lines during peak hours
Chez L'Ami Jean: Rating: 4.4 | Reviews: Michelin-starred Basque-influenced cuisine, Famous rice pudding dessert, Lively, bustling atmosphere, Reservations essential

Costs: 
Le Baratin: 30
New Asiaway: 30

content.content:
For lunch, you can visit **Le Baratin**, a cozy bistro with French cuisine. It has a high rating of 4.8 and serves homestyle cooking with a daily changing menu. The estimated cost is around €30 per person.

For dinner, you can try **New Asiaway**, a restaurant offering Chinese cuisine with a rating of 4.6. The restaurant is known for its fresh ingredients and flavorful sauces. The estimated cost is also around €30 per person.
